title: Global Energy Alliance commits $16 million to accelerate Mission 300 and Africa’s clean energy future at UNGA 80 - FinancialEDGE
description: The Global Energy Alliance for People and Planet today announced $16 million in commitments to expand energy access and accelerate clean energy deployment across Africa. Unveiled on the sidelines of the 80th session of the United Nations General Assembly (UNGA 80) these commitments support Mission 300, a collective effort led by the World Bank Group
html: The Global Energy Alliance for People and Planet today announced $16 million in commitments to expand energy access and accelerate clean energy deployment across Africa.
